# eximIA Gate — Universal Auth & Identity Contract v1

> One identity. Every app.

## How to integrate your app (4 steps)
1. Add GATE_URL to .env.local
2. Create lib/gate.ts (copy from /llms-full.txt — STEP 2)
3. Replace login UI to call gateLogin() + saveAuth()
4. Protect API routes with withGateAuth(req)

## Full integration guide with copy-paste code
GET /llms-full.txt — complete guide for AI agents

## Key endpoints
- POST /api/v1/gate/login — authenticate
- POST /api/v1/gate/register — create account
- POST /api/v1/gate/verify — validate token (server-side)
- POST /api/v1/gate/refresh — renew token
- GET /api/v1/gate/catalog — capabilities

## Contract spec (JSON)
GET /api/spec

## Interactive docs
GET /docs
